sheet.concept: A former security guard transformed by "the Pulse," who uses his powers to spot trouble and stand between danger and civilians.
sheet.backstory: Derek Briggs was a security guard before the Pulse changed him. Now, as Threshold, he watches for danger before it reaches ordinary people and uses his powers to keep civilians alive when everything goes sideways.
sheet.specialties:
Sight-based Notice checks
Detecting hidden, invisible, or concealed threats
Spotting ambushes, traps, and environmental threats
Detecting lies and suspicious motives
sheet.originTalent:
Adaptive Biology
Built-In Merit: Altered Physiology 1
Built-In Flaw: Marked by Change 1
Chosen Altered Physiology Trait: Unusual Senses
Choose 1 Origin Skill.
Choose one Power Set. Once per encounter when using an At-Will from it, choose Controlled Surge, Instinctive Control, or Biological Push.
sheet.classFeatures:
Level 1: Threat Assessment
Level 1: Reactive Awareness
sheet.startingTalent: Skilled: Gain two additional trained skills.
sheet.merits:
Altered Physiology 1
Local Support 2: Community leaders, residents, and local organizations trust Threshold. Gain Advantage when seeking assistance, information, shelter, or cooperation from local communities.
Wary 1: Gain Advantage on Insight checks to detect lies, scams, manipulation, false friendliness, or suspicious motives.
sheet.flaws:
Marked by Change 1
Responsibility to the Innocent 2: When innocent lives are in danger, Threshold prioritizes their safety above personal objectives.
Haunted 1: The memory of the Pulse and the lives changed by it continue to weigh on him. When this meaningfully complicates a situation, gain Edge.
sheet.minorTrigger: Place yourself physically between a threat and someone who cannot protect themselves, absorbing or redirecting the danger.
sheet.majorTrigger: Hold a position against a superior threat alone so that others can escape, recover, or regroup.
sheet.definingTrigger: You are defeated, critically injured, or lose something significant specifically because you refused to abandon the people you were protecting.
sheet.powerSet1Notes:
TELEPATHY 1 (Core Track 1) - Power Effect Value: 14
Passive Benefits: Sense emotional states of minded creatures within Close Range (25 ft), send and receive mental impressions within Short Range (50 ft), Advantage on Insight checks.
Psychic Assault (Tier 1 Encounter, Action): Range Short (50 ft). Attack 1d20 +5 (INT + WIS + PRO) vs Willpower. Hit: 2d8 Psychic Damage. Target rolls 1d20 + WIS vs PEV 14. Failure: Dazed. Success: Shaken. Duration: Until end of your next turn.
Telepathic Link (Tier 1 Utility): As an Action, establish a two-way telepathic link between yourself and up to 2 willing allies within Short range (50 ft). The link persists for one scene. Linked creatures can communicate silently and instantaneously regardless of distance within the scene. You may relay information to all linked creatures simultaneously as a free action once per Turn.
sheet.powerSet2Notes:
TELEKINESIS 1 (Core Track 1) - Power Effect Value: 14
Passive Benefits: Move unattended objects up to 15 pounds within Short Range (50 ft), perform fine manipulation within Close Range (25 ft).
Telekinetic Shove (Tier 1 At-Will, Action): Range Short (50 ft). Attack 1d20 +4 (DEX + WIS + PRO) vs Dodge. Hit: 1d8 +2 Force Damage. Strong Success: Push target Short Range OR Knock target Prone.
Deflection Field (Tier 1 Encounter, Reaction): Trigger: You or one ally within Close range (25 ft) is hit by a ranged attack or ranged Power. Effect: Interpose a burst of telekinetic force. Reduce the damage by 1d8 +2. If this reduces damage to 0, the attack is deflected and you may redirect the projectile at any target within Short range (50 ft) as a free action, dealing 1d8 force damage on a hit with no attack roll required.
sheet.powerSet3Notes:
TELEPORTATION 1 (Core Track 1) - Power Effect Value: 14
Passive Benefits: Teleport up to 25 feet as a Movement Action, carry worn equipment, must be able to see destination.
Combat Teleport (Tier 1 At-Will, Movement): Teleport up to 25 feet. Does not provoke Opportunity Attacks. If you appear adjacent to an enemy, gain Advantage on your next attack against that enemy before the end of your turn.
sheet.costume: Glowing eyes and white temples identify Derek as Enhanced.
sheet.enhancements:
Advantage on Initiative rolls.
Cannot be surprised while conscious.
Advantage on Insight checks from Telepathy.
Advantage on sight-based Notice checks from Altered Physiology.
Advantage on Insight checks to detect lies from Wary.
sheet.sessionNotes: "I'm the Threshold that stands between danger and civilians."
